products.name: SPF 30 Body Lotion
products.description: A hydrating body lotion with added SPF for everyday protection. Keeps skin soft while helping prevent tanning and dark spots.
products.how_to_use: Apply generously over exposed body areas 15 minutes before sun exposure and reapply every few hours.

products.name: Deep Moisture Body Cream
products.description: A rich, buttery body cream that targets roughness and tightness. Leaves limbs feeling soft and comfortably cushioned.
products.how_to_use: Massage onto body after shower or whenever skin feels dry, focusing on elbows and knees.

products.name: Restorative Hand Cream
products.description: A fast-absorbing hand cream that softens dry, overwashed hands. Helps reduce roughness and fine lines over time.
products.how_to_use: Massage a pea-sized amount onto hands whenever needed, focusing on knuckles and cuticles.

conversation_history.assistant: A clarifying conditioner can help remove product buildup, reduce oiliness, and purify the scalp, which is perfect for your oily hair. We have the Clarifying Scalp & Hair Conditioner by ScalpBalance that can help with that.

conversation_history.user: Can I use the Deep Repair Hair Mask by LushStrand with the Clarifying Scalp & Hair Conditioner?
